brief_notes: Excellent numerical accuracy: all 42 checked values (network parameters, firing rates, oscillation frequencies, synaptic time constants, NMDAR voltage dependence parameters, DPX task percentages, neuron pair counts, PCP dose, electrode spacing, timing parameters) match the source extraction exactly. No hallucinated or altered numbers detected. The paper is well-organized with clear sections, good use of tables (synaptic params, neuron params, firing rates, experimental comparison), and accurate representation of both the theoretical framework and experimental validation. Minor weaknesses: citations use placeholder keys rather than real BibTeX entries (no .bib file provided), the discussion could more explicitly address limitations from the source (e.g., omission of cortical laminar structure details), and some figure references in the source are described textually rather than included. The paper covers all major findings including the mean field analysis, linear stability analysis, two primary network configurations, sensitivity analysis, and direct comparison with experimental DPX task data. Writing quality is solid academic prose with good transitions between sections.
